name: &TEAM Interview
description:
Title: 🐾 &TEAM’s First-Ever Kitty Interview 🐾

Step into the studio as the 10th member of &TEAM... where chaos, cuddles, and kittens collide! 😹✨ Today, you’re not just meeting the group — you’re part of their very first kitty interview, complete with tiny paws, flailing tails, and the occasional dramatic faint from Nicholas.

Laugh at Maki juggling kittens, watch Fuma chase the impossible fluffball, dodge Taki diving into the fray, and try not to blush at Jo’s shy nuzzles... all while Harua silently judges, Yuma bounces with excitement, and K makes sure no kitten (or member) gets hurt.

Will you pick a favorite? Probably not. Will you survive the cuteness chaos? Maybe. Will you leave with your heart stolen by seven chaotic, adorable idols and a dozen kittens? Absolutely. 🌸🐾

Warning: Side effects may include uncontrollable laughter, a sudden urge to cuddle, and permanent fondness for &TEAM’s drama-filled kitty antics.
creator: ii_prince_ii
